subject: Your besties are back! The 6 Friends figurines… 👀
body:
With your Friends Meal, collect them all 😍 
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

 The 6 Friends figurines are making one last comeback!

Denys, who else is besties with the Friends Meal (besides you, of course)?

*The 6 Friends figurines!*

Yep, they’re making a comeback – that way, you can choose which Friends must-have* you want with each Friends Meal:

* 1 out of 4 mugs
* or 1 out of 6 figurines

Pssst, don’t forget that *you decide which Large McMenu ® you want* to turn into a Friends Meal. From the Maestro Piccante Pia and the Veggie Deluxe, to the McChicken ®. Prefer a different burger instead? The only rule? Anything is possible.

Curious about the fastest way to complete both Friends collections?

👉 *The Fan Shop in je McDonald’s ® app* :
there you can redeem *Friends Collector's Edition boxes* with your points! 
 Friends Collector's Edition box ( https://url2866.mcdonalds.be/ls/click?upn=u001.5b9bm8MQyEOFtw4g9aFjVE-2BwuLyQnpN7UVtyjD20He4qaXu8bAvDTr6i-2BdzXD0i6HS86-2BUy6-2Fz-2B7A3O9ANk5Av7SAVn31wgQYVAHv8PW4ak972qpd8VhGj00AyxBo2dhHrnPXE3IsRteA0A5PL6UCMexm-2FMm0oCLHIzXrUlNx2DPBq2baXqLRlt3XyvGXJmyly9G6il-2FMAFvqjM9Js-2B-2FdA-3D-3DBYAZ_1QnDvVxXkBjpBZebjrr8-2B8CHvou-2Frm5QRozFsrfQaMqtyb4BchlGBZcDbLhwoy0ZOjg0mprKZ-2FL1Kg2CNCjJ2GcZMGfoluWsP84EuzAO9ipjl01koK9eQEQN998KKRIBRZcGVBIKk9dguqDEAw-2Bpg6uXH9xEY9mzo5yVTk-2BRyeZ9t2037dGaH2LVKaFiR71PaFBLrOU-2FCYSo2sTCS8ixGnlllJRFmjKiKHdQt-2BGVSeXGuvo4MjlLLvx6X62pEuZIpxCBPyppjmYEtutC55nA7rPF-2FMJGIRsfvofW6tmQdDRUswfR3IOL5FOcVPGdYFNhRsH8mTCNKtXOW0-2BRwI0-2FgjcNBi2a-2Feg3JbE1adJaeEh7yndjF6mJx0vNJpsnG4xnV3c3nAboz3w6p3FGWCySpm-2B8sqiIdIXwGp7juT8yEXzkRVSiKiExR7IjRogNYaHWzA20t-2F-2FD0XbIoznXXm7uXxh1dNdBHOoqTqkpZUwj4sulf-2BP4nODwLIddSJPhJa8-2B )

When purchasing a Large McMenu ® , a Friends Mug (assigned at random) or a Friends figurine (assigned at random) can be added to the order for an additional charge.The Friends Meal Box is no longer available.
